briefs.tldr: Day 8 (Week 2) of MAE onboarding. **R006–R009 are now 7 days stale** — unblocking even one lets the night-builder resume. Side project today: **morning-brief**.
briefs.tldr_short: MAE Week 2 Day 8. R006–R009 7 days stale — unblock one to restart night-builder. Side project: morning-brief.

briefs.tldr: R006–R009 are now 6 days old — pick ANY one and reply with a single line so night-builder has a target. Today's lever is week-2 standup credibility: get MAE running locally and bring one quotable insight from the paper of the day. Side project of the day: morning-brief (per D009).
briefs.tldr_short: Day 7. R006–R009 = 6 days old, drain ≥1. Get MAE to localhost. Side project: morning-brief.

briefs.tldr: R006–R009 are now 4 days old and still blocking three side-project repos and the night-builder. Drain at least one today, then claim the last weekend block to get MAE to localhost:3000 before Monday standup. Side project of the day: morning-brief (per D009).
briefs.tldr_short: Day 5. R006–R009 now 4 days old — drain ≥1. Last weekend window for MAE local stack. Side project: morning-brief.

briefs.tldr: Weekend opening: R006–R009 have been sitting 3 days and are blocking every side project. Spend 10 min draining them, then claim a hands-on MAE block before the laptop cools. Side project of the day: morning-brief (drain the queue, freeze others per D009).
briefs.tldr_short: Day 4. R006–R009 still blocking — drain in 10 min. Weekend MAE local-stack block. Side project: morning-brief.

briefs.tldr: Day 3: MAE local stack is the hands-on priority; 4 pending-review decisions (R006–R009) are blocking side-project progress and need your call. Single side project of the day: morning-brief (drain the queue, then freeze).
briefs.tldr_short: Day 3 MAE onboarding. R006–R009 need decisions. Side-project-of-day: morning-brief.

briefs.tldr: MAE onboarding pack indexed + Eval-Driven-Dev 1-pager drafted for Jun. Side-project-of-the-day: morning-brief (indexing infra). Others frozen per new D009 single-focus rule.
briefs.tldr_short: Day 2 MAE onboarding. Side-project-of-day: morning-brief. Eval-Driven-Dev 1-pager drafted.

briefs.tldr: **Night-builder #2 shipped.** [BedRock PR #1](https://github.com/Taylorblue123/BedRock/pull/1) — Astro site bolted onto your existing repo, preserving privacy. ⚠️ **Correction:** first draft propagated a CVPR 2026 claim from your old portfolio — you flagged as fake, agent removed it everywhere in the PR. Stale sources still have it (R003).
briefs.tldr_short: BedRock PR #1: Astro site. CVPR claim scrubbed per correction. 2 items in /feedback.
